steps.title: Turn the data into points
steps.content: The input $t$ is years after $2000$. The production is $5$ million barrels when $t=0$ and $2.7$ million barrels when $t=15$, so the points are $(0,5)$ and $(15,2.7)$.

steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content:
Use the slope formula.
$$m=\frac{2.7-5}{15-0}=\frac{-2.3}{15}=-\frac{23}{150}$$
The initial value is $5$, so the model is
$$f(t)=-\frac{23}{150}t+5$$

steps.title: Match the model
steps.content: The equation with negative slope $-\frac{23}{150}$ and initial value $5$ is choice C. The answer is C.
